mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistically significant positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-year rolling window (Rank IC < 0.02).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal fails to predict direction in backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a negative or flat 60-day return in > 55% of occurrences, or the interaction term loses predictive power when controlled for monetary policy.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal reverses direction during late-cycle expansions, producing negative 20-day returns when INDPRO rises, or Rank IC drops below 0.01 in regime-specific tests.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above 225.0 trigger inflation hedging behavior and expectations of tighter monetary policy, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in > 60% of threshold-crossing events, or the signal shows no predictive power in out-of-sample walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent monthly gains in nonfarm payrolls indicate robust economic activity and rising corporate revenues, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth correlates negatively with 60-day equity returns over a 2-year rolling window, or the signal fails to beat a buy-and-hold benchmark in backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in real GDP and retail sales validates aggregate demand momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative 20-day returns in > 50% of triggered periods, or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for interest rate changes.

mechanism_narrative: Diverging industrial production and unemployment trends signal structural supply bottlenecks and labor market inefficiencies, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises and UNRATE rises simultaneously
failure_condition: The divergence signal produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of occurrences, or the mechanism fails to predict direction during late-cycle expansions.
